preservedBehaviors.description: API route returns 403 when requireCompanyUser rejects
API route returns 403 for users without edit permission (non-Admin roles)
API route returns 400 when plan_id is missing
API route returns 404 when plan is not found
API route returns 400 when office address is not set
API route clamps max_routes between 1 and 5
API route uses mileage_status and mileage_error fields in proposed route output
API route has normalizeMileageStatus function mapping to estimated/skipped/pending
API route reports skipped_routes in response meta
API route skips routes when normalizedStops + 1 > 50 (too many stops)
API route has markSkipped helper that sets mileage_status to skipped
API route has markEstimated helper that sets mileage_status to estimated
API route filters remaining routes excluding skipped ones via normalizeMileageStatus
API route calls ensureMileageColumns adding mileage_status and mileage_error columns
API route has truncateError function that truncates at 220 characters
Hook normalizes route with mileage_status and mileage_error properties
Hook tracks milesSkippedRoutes in proposedWeekSummary (not milesFailedRoutes)
Hook tracks milesSkippedRoutes per tech in proposedTotalsByTech
Hook computeClientRemaining filters by mileage_status not skipped
Hook exports useSplashDrivePlanner with all expected fields
Hook runs a miles loop with a max of 60 iterations
Component uses milesSkippedRoutes from proposedWeekSummary
Component shows status pills with mileage_status (skipped or pending)
Component shows mileage_error for skipped routes
Component renders a note about skipped routes in partial miles warning
Component shows 'Travel miles (est. so far)' when some but not all miles estimated
Component renders all 7 weekday columns and Estimate miles / Print buttons
Component renders Week totals by tech table
